case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. RICHARD BRENNAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT BRENNAN, RICHARD JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRENNAN, RICHARD $1,025.00 PRINCIPAL, $93.91 INTEREST, $99.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,217.91, TOTAL $ 1,217.91 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
